name: Mace Cake
recipeIngredient: 1 cup Butter (or 1/2 cup butter & 1/2 cup Crisco)
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat the oven to 350 degrees Fahrenheit.
2. Grease and flour a bundt pan.
3. Mix all ingredients in a large bowl until well combined.
4. Pour the batter into the prepared bundt pan.
5. Bake for one hour, or until a toothpick inserted into the center comes out clean.
6. Top with icing or serve plain.
